ddls:
CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "wife_age" INTEGER /* Age of the wife */,
  "wife_education" INTEGER /* Education level of the wife (1-4) */,
  "husband_education" INTEGER /* Education level of the husband (1-4) */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children ever born */,
  "wife_religion" INTEGER /* Religion of the wife (0-1) */,
  "wife_working" INTEGER /* Whether the wife is currently working (0-1) */,
  "husband_occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the husband (1-4) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Annual household income */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the family resides */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the family was part of */,
  "media_exposure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media exposure level */,
  "standard_of_living_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard of living index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_wife_working FOREIGN KEY ("wife_working") REFERENCES working_status ("working_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_num_children FOREIGN KEY ("num_children") REFERENCES children ("children_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_wife_education FOREIGN KEY ("wife_education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_media_exposure_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_exposure_id") REFERENCES media_exposure ("media_exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_standard_of_living_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_of_living_id") REFERENCES standard_of_living ("standard_of_living_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_husband_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("husband_occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_wife_religion FOREIGN KEY ("wife_religion") REFERENCES religions ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_husband_education FOREIGN KEY ("husband_education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level (1-4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the education level (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (1-4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation (e.g., professional, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion (0-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_status" (
  "working_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working status */,
  "working_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the working status (0-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the working status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("working_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "children_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of children */,
  "num_children" INTEGER /* Number of children ever born */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the children (e.g., 0-5, 6-12, 13-18) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("children_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_of_living" (
  "standard_of_living_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard of living index */,
  "standard_of_living_index" INTEGER /* Standard of living index (1-4) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the standard of living (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_of_living_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_exposure" (
  "media_exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media exposure level */,
  "media_exposure_level" INTEGER /* Media exposure level (0-1) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the media exposure (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_exposure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contraceptive_methods" (
  "contraceptive_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contraceptive method */,
  "contraceptive_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the contraceptive method (1-10) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the contraceptive method (e.g., hormonal, barrier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contraceptive_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contraceptive_use" (
  "contraceptive_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contraceptive use */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family using the contraceptive method */,
  "contraceptive_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contraceptive method used */,
  "use_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of use (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contraceptive_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contraceptive_use_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contraceptive_use_contraceptive_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("contraceptive_method_id") REFERENCES contraceptive_methods ("contraceptive_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., baseline, follow-up) */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_survey_date FOREIGN KEY ("survey_date") REFERENCES survey_families ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_families" (
  "survey_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey family */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the family was part of */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family surveyed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_families_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the user accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_regions" (
  "survey_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey region */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey conducted in the region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the survey was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_regions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
